# Functional Requirements

## FR-1: Data Import @feature1

System SHALL import data from CSV files.

### Details

- UTF-8 encoding support
- Use dataProcessor for settings

## FR-2: Data Export @feature2

System SHALL export reports to PDF format.

### Details

- Template-based generation
- Use DataProcessor for export settings

## FR-3: Data Validation

System SHALL validate imported data against schema.

### Details

- Schema-based validation
- Error reporting with dataProcessor

## FR-4: Email Notifications — OUT OF SCOPE

> OUT OF SCOPE — Not needed for MVP, planned for v2.

System would send email notifications on data import completion.
